sutta: once the exalted 1 dwelt near vesali at savan dada shrine and there are a number of lithavis visited him and saluted and sat down at 1 side then the exalted 1 addressed them thus seated and said hives i will teach you 7 things that cause not decline listen give heed i will speak yes lord they replied and the exalted 1 said what 7 things cause not decline so long only chubbies as you will hold regular and frequent assemblies growth may be expected and not declined so long as we shall sit down in concord or harmony rise up in concord do business in concord growth may be expected not decline so long as you shall not decree the undecreed nor repeal the decree but conform to the ancient margin laws as decree growth may be expected not declined so long as you shall honor respect venerate revere the virgin elders shall whole they ought to be listened to growth may be expected not decline so long as you shall not forcibly kidnap and make live with you others wives and daughters growth may be expected not declined so long as you shall honor respect venerate revere the vajan shrines within and without or outside the borders shall not fail to provide proper offerings as before made before growth may be expected not declined so long as proper protection refuge shelter shall be provided for arahants so that it shall be known that arahants from abort from abroad may come and that those there dwell in comfort growth or lichavi's may be expected for the rajyan is not declined and so long as these 7 things that cause not decline shall endure among the bhajans and they shall live in conformity there with growth holy javis may be expected for the virgins not declined that's the end of the supta the lichavis are a group of people a race of people they are also called bhajans so the buddha is teaching them as these 7 very important things for any group of people to progress and not to decline first 1 they should hold regular and frequent meetings the first 1 very regular and frequent meetings the second 1 when they meet they should meet in harmony or concord the third 1 the ancient laws or rules should not be repealed but they should conform to the laws or rules as laid down from before the fourth 1 they should honor respect venerate the elders listen to the elders and then the fifth 1 that they should not kidnap and make live with them other people's wives and daughters the 6 are they should venerate the virgin shrines where they pay respect to the devasa and and provide proper offerings it is part of the buddha's teachings that allay people should uh show respect towards the devas because the devas have a lot of influence on our lives then the seventh 1 they should provide protection refuge and shelter for arahants so that other holy men may also come to their place so these are very important conditions that are practical even today for any group of people to progress we should practice these 7 things whether it's any particular race or any particular group of people these are very important qualities that we should remember to practice
